issue: CI npm pack destination fails on fresh runner

checks: workflow creates dist before npm pack writes into it
dist is deleted before running the package command
package tarball exists after the command completes

why_this_counts: The issue came from the first private hosted GitHub Actions run, not a synthetic benchmark fixture.
The visible smoke proof would not catch the bug by itself.
The ReplayPack invariant captures the real launch failure mode.
limitations: This is self-dogfood inside the ReplayPack repository, not an external repository trial.
